description: This file defines the AppRole entity class used for role-based access control (RBAC) in the system. It is annotated as a JPA entity with fields for UUID id and RoleName name, along with constructors, getters, and setters.

classes.name: AppRole
classes.description: Entity class representing a role in the RBAC system with UUID id and RoleName name.

methods.name: AppRole()
methods.description: Default constructor for the AppRole class.

methods.name: AppRole(UUID id, RoleName name)
methods.description: Constructor to initialize AppRole with specific UUID and RoleName.

methods.name: getId()
methods.description: Returns the UUID identifier of the role.

methods.name: getName()
methods.description: Returns the RoleName enumeration value representing the role's name.

methods.name: setId(UUID id)
methods.description: Sets the UUID identifier for the role.
